patch.value: Verify daily auto-release published to npm (release-health check)

Recurring release-health verification. The date-based daily auto-release has silently failed before (padded-month changelog match skip; publish/Sentry-gate step failing post-tag). After any merge to main, confirm the next daily release both tagged a new vYYYY.M.D AND advanced npm 'latest'.

value.text: Confirm daily auto-release tagged a new version AND npm latest advanced; else inspect publish + Sentry-gate steps

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-06-10 daily auto-release (scheduled run 27258655654, 06:50Z) FAILED at sentry-telemetry-gate: PM-CLI-1J 'CommandError: {' — a CommandError whose message was the raw guided-error JSON envelope (code tracker_not_initialized) thrown by an ephemeral temp-dir script (readPmItemsForUpsert, source no longer on disk; 2 events 2026-06-09T21:34Z). Gate classifier fix already landed in PR #197 (fba75fb0, merged 11:34Z, adds 'tracker_not_initialized' to KNOWN_EXPECTED_HANDLED_CLI_ISSUE_PATTERNS) but AFTER the scheduled run. Recovery: resolved PM-CLI-1J in Sentry + re-dispatched auto-release.yml with push=true (run 27284359777). Will verify v2026.6.10 npm publish before closing.

value.note: Ignore expected handled apply-failure CommandError and expose blocking issue IDs
Regression coverage for updated sentry gate output/classification

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-consolidation-20260616
value.text: Auto-release gate reproduced locally with SENTRY_PERSONAL_ADMIN_TOKEN; failing high issue was PM-CLI-1Q (handled CommandError: all items failed to apply). Added count-agnostic handled pattern 'item(s) failed to apply' and blocking_short_ids/blocking_titles output for diagnostics. Gate now passes in strict mode with max-high=0.

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-consolidation-20260616
value.text: Release-health verification: sentry-telemetry gate now passes in strict mode (max-critical=0,max-high=0) after expected handled-CommandError classification update; output now includes blocking_short_ids/blocking_titles for actionable diagnostics.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: 2026-06-17 verification: after merging PR #263 (GH-216/217), dispatched auto-release with push=true → Release workflow succeeded → tag v2026.6.17 cut → npm @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.6.17 published. Telemetry stack healthy (12,982 events/24h, queue drained, all containers up); Sentry live with 0 new unresolved errors/24h. NOTE: the 02:35 UTC SCHEDULED auto-release still fails on the stale Sentry reliability gate (tracked separately as pm-nb08); manual dispatch is the current reliable path.
